title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the harness (rules, skills, hooks, subagents, workflow orchestration) from the underlying model in agentic coding systems. The harness comprises roughly 98% of a coding agent's value and operates at two levels: the single-session AI layer and multi-session workflow orchestration for scaling to larger tasks.
